title: EoSB1 Sprint 44 - Update versionCode generation for Americas
summary: Updated updateconfig.py to support the new 5-digit versionCode format required for Americas release 8.11.0. Also modified how UAT and PROD codes are offset to avoid conflicts with other markets.

title: Migrate android-release.yml to reusable workflow
summary: Refactored android-release.yml to use a reusable workflow pattern. The main workflow now calls .github/workflows/release-core.yml with parameters. Existing callers must update their workflow references.

title: Pilot branch strategy change for Sprint 44+
summary: Investigating whether madf/pilot branch is still needed for QA smoke testing. There is a proposal to consolidate pilot branches into a single extra/pilot flow starting Sprint 45.

title: Auth flow fails silently after app reinstall on Android 13
summary: Fixed MSAL cache issue after app reinstall on Android 13. The silent auth check was not handling MsalClientException for cache corruption. Added fallback to interactive login with cache clear.

title: Upgrade MSAL Android SDK to v5.x
summary: Upgrading MSAL Android SDK from 4.x to 5.x. The new version changes how accounts are managed and introduces breaking changes in the AcquireTokenParameters API. Auth flow documentation will need update once migration is complete.

title: Rewards API v2 migration - update endpoints
summary: Migrated from Rewards API v1 to v2. New base URL is /v2 (previously /v1). The balance endpoint response format changed to include tier information. Redemption endpoint now requires stationId in request body.

title: Branch.io SDK upgrade and deep link route refactor
summary: Upgrading Branch.io SDK to v5 and refactoring deep link routing to support new in-app navigation destinations added in Sprint 43. New routes include /promotions and /stations/nearby.

title: App Links verification failing in production
summary: Fixed App Links verification by updating the digital asset links JSON at app.shell.com/.well-known/assetlinks.json. The certificate fingerprint had changed after a recent keystore rotation.

title: Lokalise pull process - automate via GitHub Actions
summary: Added automated Lokalise string pull to the CI pipeline. Strings are now pulled automatically on PR creation targeting develop. Manual pull process documented in Lokalise doc is now partially obsolete.

title: Add new Azure secrets for Rewards API v2
summary: Added new Azure Key Vault secrets for Rewards API v2 authentication. New secrets: SHELL-REWARDS-V2-CLIENT-ID and SHELL-REWARDS-V2-SECRET. Updated GitHub Actions workflows to reference new secrets.
